name: Gravit Designer
description: Cross-platform vector design tool (now Corel Vector) running in the browser and on desktop. Originally founded in Berlin, acquired by Corel Corporation in 2018.

seo.title: Gravit Designer — Design Tools / Design-to-Code
seo.meta_description: Gravit Designer: Cross-platform vector design tool (now Corel Vector) running in the browser and on desktop. Originally founded in Berlin, acquired by Corel Cor

when_to_use: Browser-based vector icon set created without Illustrator license
Marketing banner designed collaboratively in Corel Vector cloud
SVG export pipeline for web assets from cross-platform editor
Legacy Gravit project file reopened in Corel Vector
Free vector design tool adopted by budget-constrained indie team

pros: Cross-platform vector editor runs in browser and desktop
Useful free tier for casual vector work
cons: Under Corel, update cadence has slowed
Smaller community versus Figma or Affinity Designer
Ecosystem of plugins and resources is limited
review.verdict: Capable budget vector editor, but Figma, Penpot, and Affinity Designer make it a harder sell in 2026.
review.best_for: Hobbyists and small teams wanting a cross-platform vector editor cheaper than Illustrator.
review.not_for: Professional product designers who need deep ecosystems and active development.
